text.heading: IN THE COURT OF APPEAL HOLDEN AT BENIN CITY
STATUTORY DECLARATION OF AGE
text.p:
I, Mrs
(F) a Christian, Citizen of the Federal Republic of Nigeria, residing at do hereby make an Oath and declare as follows

2. That the said
was born on the at in Local Government Area of State of Nigeria.
3. That at the time of birth, it was not officially registered, hence this affidavit.
4. That this affidavit is now required for record and official purposes.
5. That I make this affidavit conscientiously believing the same to be true and in accordance with the provisions of Oath Act of 1963.
Sworn to at the Court of Appeal Registry Benin City this 29th day of June 2007
